Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activities identified OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB DP D

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1 OR MS QS AS IQC AS TST RT TST PK LB DP D one IQC followed by AS then TST RT TST testing loop then PK LB DP D

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 2 OR MS QS AS IQC AS TST PK DP D same as case 1 but no RT and no LB

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 3 multiple IQC with possible re assembly testing loop with RT then PK LB DP D

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 4 OR MS QS AS TST PK LB DP D no IQC at all no RT includes LB

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 5 multiple IQC AS cycles multiple RT cycles

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: OR MS QS is a fixed sequence at the start

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests do AS then while IQC fails do AS again The loop is AS IQC where after AS optionally do IQC and then AS again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: TST RT TST pattern loop This is TST RT do TST optionally do RT and repeat TST

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Labeling LB is optional Some cases include LB after PK some do not This is a choice LB skip

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The structure is PK LB skip DP D Or more precisely the choice is between LB and skip and after the choice whether LB or skip we proceed to DP

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me check if there is any concurrency in the event log Looking at the timestamps LB happens before DP This means we have a choice do LB then go to DP or skip LB then go to DP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: OR MS QS Assembly Loop Testing Loop PK Labeling Choice DP D

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Assembly Loop equals AS IQC Testing Loop equals TST RT Labeling Choice equals LB SilentTransition

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is a complete and valid POWL model Let me verify it against the cases

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Case 3 has AS IQC IQC AS IQC AS which does not fit the simple loop model perfectly

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait this has two IQC in a row before AS Let me reconsider

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: One option AS X IQC tau but this allows only one IQC per iteration Another option model the IQC part as a loop itself

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: In process mining we often simplify the observed behavior into a model The key behavior is AS is done IQC may be done potentially multiple times AS may be done again This can repeat

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop AS IQC does capture case 1 2 4 5 patterns For case 3 we have an additional consecutive IQC which is a slight deviation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For simplicity I will use the loop model The model is OR MS QS AS IQC TST RT PK LB skip DP D This is a clean interpretable model

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop TST RT captures TST then either exit or RT and TST again This matches the observed behavior For labeling the choice LB skip captures the cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Root partial order sequential ordering OR to MS MS to QS QS to assembly loop assembly loop to testing loop testing loop to PK PK to labeling choice labeling choice to DP DP to D
